AMENDED DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-24-2012 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on defendant City & County of San Francisco's demurrer to plaintiff Gilles Combrisson's third amended complaint, and for further case management conference.
Department 220. Judge: James J. McBride; Clerk: Kevin R. Dougherty; CSR: Reporter Waived.

Nicholas A. Carlin, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Gilles Combrisson, individually and on behalf of all other similarly situated.
Owen J. Clements, Esq. and Danny Choi appeared for defendant City & County of San Francisco. Gillian Morshedi, Esq. appeared for Anthem Blue Cross.
Matthew J. Poole, Esq. appeared for Heath Net.

After reviewing the moving & opposition papers, hearing argument by counsel, and good cause appearing therefor, the Court Orders that defendant City & County of San Francisco's Demurrer as to plaintiff Gilles Combrisson's second, third, fourth, fifth, sixth, eighth & ninth causes of action is SUSTAINED with leave to amend.

Defedant City & County of San Francisco's Demurrer to plaintiff's tenth cause of action for declaratory is OVERRULED. Plaintiff shall have thirty (30) days to amend the complaint.

The Case Management Conference is CONTINUED TO February 29, 2012 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 220. Further Case Management Statements are not necessary.

Counsel for the City & County of San Francisco shall prepare the Order After Hearing.
